## Pull Request Guidelines

Thank you for contributing to Agent Team Orchestrator! Please follow these guidelines:

### Before Submitting

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines (Black for Python, ESLint for TS)
- [ ] All tests pass: `pytest` and `vitest run`
- [ ] Linting passes: `ruff check`, `black --check`
- [ ] Documentation is updated if needed
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits format

### PR Description Template

## Description
Brief description of changes

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing
Describe the testing strategy for this change:
- Unit tests added/updated?
- Manual testing steps?
- Screenshots (if UI changes)?

## Related Issues
Closes #issue_number

### Review Process
1. Maintainers will review your PR within a few days
2. Address any review comments by pushing new commits to your branch
3. Once approved, a maintainer will merge your PR
